prompts.name: Motorcycle
prompts.text: Add a motorcycle with clear mechanical detail, polished surfaces, believable scale, and strong visual presence.

prompts.name: Modern Car
prompts.text: Add a modern car with clean reflections, realistic proportions, and polished exterior detail.

prompts.name: Sports Car
prompts.text: Add a sleek sports car with aerodynamic shape, glossy paint, and dramatic styling.

prompts.name: Vintage Car
prompts.text: Add a vintage car with classic bodywork, chrome details, and nostalgic character.

prompts.name: Train
prompts.text: Add a train or train platform context with believable scale, tracks, lighting, and travel atmosphere.

prompts.name: Bicycle
prompts.text: Add a bicycle with clear frame structure, wheels, handlebars, and natural placement.

prompts.name: Scooter
prompts.text: Add a scooter with compact design, urban charm, and realistic scale.

prompts.name: Airship
prompts.text: Add a fantasy or steampunk airship with large balloon structure, rigging, and grand sky presence.

prompts.name: Spaceship
prompts.text: Add a spaceship with advanced design, glowing engines, clean panels, and believable futuristic scale.

prompts.name: Mecha
prompts.text: Add a large mecha with strong mechanical silhouette, layered armor plates, and industrial detail.

prompts.name: Boat
prompts.text: Add a boat with water interaction, realistic materials, and calm travel atmosphere.

prompts.name: Sailboat
prompts.text: Add a sailboat with fabric sails, mast rigging, and a peaceful ocean or lake setting.

prompts.name: Subway Train
prompts.text: Add a subway train with urban transit detail, platform lighting, and everyday city atmosphere.

prompts.name: Hover Vehicle
prompts.text: Add a futuristic hover vehicle with glowing lift elements, sleek design, and advanced technology.

prompts.name: Horse Carriage
prompts.text: Add a horse carriage with wooden wheels, decorative structure, and historical or fantasy charm.
